---
name: Enhancement
about: Suggest an MVP-compatible improvement
title: "[Enhancement] "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Problem
What reviewer, user, or maintainer issue does this solve?

## Proposed Change
Describe the change clearly and keep it in MVP scope.

## Why This Matters
How does this improve safety, maintainability, or demo reliability?

## Scope Check
- [ ] Not a wallet feature
- [ ] Not multisig/paymaster/account abstraction expansion
- [ ] No new backend service required
